leadText: The Galactic Key (Japanese: ギンガだんのカギ Galaxy Gang's Key) is a Key Item introduced in Generation IV.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Diamond, Pearl , Platinum , Brilliant Diamond, and Shining Pearl [ edit | edit source ] The Galactic Key allows the player to open the locked doors at the Galactic Warehouse Underpass and the lobby of the Team Galactic HQ . Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon [ edit | edit source ] During Episode RR , the Galactic Key disengages the mirror door in Lusamine 's room in Team Rocket's Castle , or, in case it has already been disengaged, activates the warp panel behind it. It breaks after being used, consuming the item.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Method D P Pt Galactic Warehouse Underpass US UM Team Rocket's Castle (from Cyrus after defeating him) BD SP Galactic Warehouse Underpass

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 A card key for disengaging security systems in the Galactic HQ. Losing it can result in punishment, apparently. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A card key for disengaging the security systems in the Galactic HQ. Losing it can result in punishment, apparently.
